title: 有馬記念の後に・振り向かぬ背

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder finishes the race with splendid
results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it seems Maruzensky's absence is still
weighing on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky feels ignored, admitting frustration at
how dismissive Grass Wonder is of the rivals right
in front of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only then does Grass Wonder realize she hasn't
truly clashed with her contemporaries.
